inputs.product_idea: An AI-powered meeting assistant that records, transcribes, and summarizes meetings with action item extraction and CRM integration
inputs.target_audience: Engineering managers at SaaS companies with 50 to 200 person teams who spend 15 hours per week in meetings
inputs.business_context: Competing with Otter.ai and Fireflies.ai. Differentiate on action item tracking with automatic CRM updates and team accountability dashboards.
